author.description: Optional GitHub login to scope the list to one author's pull requests.

date_from.description: Recency floor for merged/closed PRs — relative ('-30d', '-8w') or ISO8601. Open PRs are always included regardless of age. Defaults to -30d.

source_id.description: Connected GitHub data warehouse source to read from. Defaults to the oldest connected GitHub source when the team has more than one.
